⚡ Datanomix API Integration
Paste your API key below to connect live machine data — utilization, cycle times, OEE, and part counts will appear directly on every machine card on the shop floor.
Not connected — enter API key below
WHAT CONNECTS AUTOMATICALLY
✓ Live utilization %
✓ Cycle time vs target
✓ Parts count today
✓ OEE per machine
✓ ON TARGET / SLOW bars
✓ Dashboard production #s
All 26 machines are pre-mapped to their Datanomix IDs — no setup needed. The moment you paste the API key, every machine card updates live every 60 seconds.
🔔 Pushover Notification Settings
To notify ALL managers at once, create a free Delivery Group in your Pushover account at pushover.net/groups, add each manager's Pushover account, then paste the Group Key below.
Alerts sent only to you: HOT priority, Needs Attention, Job Running, Job Completed, Pending WO, Machinist Req, New User Signup
Every 🔴 Inspection Request fires a siren alert to this key — directly to your Quality Manager's phone.
Same 🔴 Inspection Request siren alert also goes to this key — a second inspector's phone, in addition to the Quality Manager above.
How to set up:
1. Open pushover.net on desktop → Dashboard → Create Group
2. Add each manager's Pushover email/username to the group
3. Copy the Group Key and paste it above
4. Hit TEST — all managers should receive a test notification
🎙 SPARKY — SHOP VOICE & MUSIC
Upload MP3s here — Sparky plays them between floor updates. Any audio file works. They go into Firebase Storage and play on all devices.
Songs upload ONCE to Firebase and play for everyone forever. No re-uploading needed.
⚠ Requires Firebase Storage rules: allow read, write: if true on /music/ path
Loading songs from Firebase...
Jim auto-starts when you log in and reads floor activity live. For a real human voice, add your ElevenLabs API key below (free at elevenlabs.io — 10,000 chars/month).
Jim reads live shop floor activity out loud — new requests, setups, comments, machine shoutouts, and hype. Activate him and he handles the rest.
JIM IS OFF
⬤ ON AIR
AUTO SHOUTOUT EVERY
JIM ANNOUNCES IN REAL TIME:
🔴 New inspection requests  •  🏃 Machinist & floor support requests
▶ When you hit START — machine, WO#, op#, operator name
⏸ When a job is put on hold — reads the reason
💬 Comments posted in the live feed — both directions
⏱ Auto shoutouts every few minutes — machine utilization, floor status

🤖 HILL AI ASSISTANT
Hey Miguel — search anything saved to your app. All results are printable as PDF. 🔍 SEARCH OPTIONS: • WO# — type "26-0173" → every request on that job, who touched it, timestamps, times • Employee — type "Jimmy" → full history of their requests • Request type — use the quick buttons above, or type "machinist", "inspection", "pending", etc. • Machine — type "3000-A" or "VF-3" → all requests on that machine • Item/Supply — type "gloves", "endmill", "drills" → every request that mentions it • Date — type "today", "this week" • Status — type "open" or "completed" Every result shows: date, time, operator, type, WO#, details, elapsed time, status — all printable as PDF.
🔷 DATANOMIX ALERTS
Welcome to DNX Search — your full Datanomix alert history. 🔍 SEARCH OPTIONS: • Machine name — type "VF-3" or "403-A" → all alerts for that machine • Reason — type "tool change" or "lunch" → alerts with that resolution • Employee — type "Jimmy" → alerts they resolved • Date — type "today", "this week", "this month" • Status — type "active" or "unresolved" → open alerts • WO# — type "26-0288" → alerts tied to that job Every result shows machine, duration, timestamp, resolution, and a RESOLVE button for open alerts.
🔷 Close DNX Alert

ProShop blocks embedding for security — tap any link below to open directly in your browser. Use ↗ OPEN PROSHOP to log in, then come back and import your CSV into the Planner.

      

    


    
    

    
    
QUICK LINKS

    


      

      

      

      

      

      

      

    


    
    
IMPORT INTO PLANNER

    

      

        How to export from ProShop:

        1. Open Work Orders in ProShop

        2. Click Reports → Active WOs by Must Leave By

        3. Hit Export CSV and save the file

        4. Tap the button below to import it
